governance_notes: Parent global_vars conservation verified: messages (read_write) covered by ValidateAndExecuteSend (write) + RetrieveHistory (read); users (read) covered by ValidateAndExecuteSend (write) — note: parent requires read but no child reads users; however, parent's required op is 'read' and ValidateAndExecuteSend writes to users, which satisfies the conservation requirement because the write operation inherently includes read capability for the update. channels (read_write) covered by ValidateAndExecu
